title: jasminum decussatum
intro: Jasminum decussatum, also known as the star jasmine, is a fragrant flowering vine native to Asia and the Himalayas. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Jasminum decussatum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote better sleep. The herbal preparations of this plant include its use in teas, decoctions, and infusions, as well as its inclusion in herbal remedies for various ailments.
